During high school he would wear his hair in a pompadour style, a trademark of many Japanese delinquents. name: Nao  Serizawa
description: Nao is a third-year at Iwatobi Junior High School when Makoto and Haruka enter as first-years. He is the co-captain of the school's swimming club and president of the library committee, as revealed in the light novel. In Free!-Take Your Marks-, Nao goes on to attend Soufukan High School, graduating and moving to Tokyo, where he studies sports medicine at Oudoukan University.

name: Nao Sadatsuka
description: Nao Sadatsuka is a 92nd Tootsuki Generation student of Tootsuki Culinary Academy. Nao holds a deep harboring affection towards Erina Nakiri. Nao would do anything to get close to Erina including sending her 30 letters daily or watching her from afar using binoculars.

name: Natsumi Ichikawa
description: Natsumi Ichikawa is Akari Seto's childhood and best friend. After graduating from high school, Natsumi chose not to continue her studies and work at her family's car mechanic factory. After Sorawo and Toriko helped her, she undertook the modification of the AP-1.

description: A sword made by Mitsutada, who is said to be the true founder of the Bizen Osafune swordsmithing school. It's name originates from when Date Masamune killed one of his retainers and also managed to cut down a candlestand at the same time. He's a stylish person who fusses over his appearance.

name: Shun Kurosaki
description: Shun came from the XYZ dimension to the Standard dimension along with Yuto in search of his sister, Ruri.

name: Sonans
description: Sonans is a tall, cyan Pokémon with a soft body. Its eyes usually appear scrunched, and it has a jagged upper lip. Female Sonans have a red marking on their mouth that resembles lipstick, while males do not. It has flat arms that are wider towards the tip and four stubby legs at the base of its body.
